channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: The Importance of Being Goofy (with Oscar Montoya)
item.description:
Oscar Montoya joins Brennan to discuss authenticity, leveling up, and Colombian snacks.

Duration: 1:27:43

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, oscar montoya
